docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,456.77 FILED BY JABER, ANTON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, IVAN C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED MAR-06-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, IVAN C

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLAIM LYNN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANTON JABER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IVAN C GOMEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY JABER, ANTON GOMEZ, IVAN C
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JABER, ANTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, IVAN C $60.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, IVAN C
